evals.prompt: Diagnose a SLURM LAMMPS GPU job that runs much slower than expected. It uses 2 nodes, 128 MPI tasks, 2 CPUs per task, 4 GPUs total, and runs MPI+OpenMP+GPU.
evals.expected_output: GPU build, device binding, and ranks-per-GPU layout review; flags 32.0 ranks/GPU oversubscription across the 4 GPUs.
assertions: reports the ranks-per-GPU warning of exactly 32.0 ranks/GPU from hpc_runtime_doctor.py (128 tasks / 4 GPUs)
reports resource_layout.gpus=4 and total_cpus=256 from the script output

script_checks.description: GPU slow: 32.0 ranks/GPU oversubscription on 4 GPUs

assert.value: Many MPI ranks per GPU (32.0 ranks/GPU) may reduce GPU efficiency.

evals.prompt: My MOOSE job gets killed before finishing and no result files are copied back. It ran on SLURM with 4 nodes, 256 tasks, walltime 12:00:00, and the job died with killed/timeout and no restart files saved.
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses scheduler kill, walltime exhaustion, and missing restart; recommends writing restart files and copying them out of scratch.
assertions: reports the restart diagnosis category=restart with the action to copy restart files out of scratch from hpc_runtime_doctor.py
reports resource_layout.tasks_per_node=64 and total_cpus=256 from the script output

assert.value: Large parallel jobs should use node-local or parallel scratch for heavy I/O.

evals.prompt: Review a hybrid MPI/OpenMP layout on SLURM with 2 nodes, 128 tasks and 1 CPU per task, using MPI+OpenMP.
evals.expected_output: Flags that OpenMP is requested but cpus_per_task is 1 so threads have no cores; reports the layout and a one-variable retry.
assertions: reports the exact OpenMP warning 'OpenMP requested but cpus_per_task is 1.' from hpc_runtime_doctor.py
reports resource_layout.total_cpus=128 and cpus_per_task=1 from the script output

script_checks.description: Hybrid layout: OpenMP requested but cpus_per_task=1

assert.value: change one resource variable at a time
